def solve(nums: list[int], queries: list[list[int]]) -> list[int]:
    ans = []
    for l, r, t in queries:
        subarray = nums[l:r+1]
        cnt = Counter(subarray)
        max_freq = -1
        best_num = -1
        for num, freq in cnt.items():

                    max_freq = freq
                    best_num = num
        ans.append(best_num if max_freq != -1 else -1)
    return ans

            if freq >= t:
                if freq > max_freq or (freq == max_freq and num < best_num):
                    max_freq = freq
                    best_num = num
        ans.append(best_num if max_freq != -1 else -1)
    return ans
